mysite
Table of Contents

Namespace BLL.DTOs

Classes

AgendaDTO

Represents a single availability window for a facility space on a given day of the week.

ClienteDTO

Projection of a Cliente entity used across all BLL service boundaries.

ComprobanteDTO

Transfer object representing a receipt (comprobante) file attached to a payment or reservation.

EjercicioDTO

Represents a single exercise entry within a RutinaDTO.

EspacioDTO

Projection of a Espacio (sporting space/facility) entity exposed through BLL service boundaries.

GenerarReservaDTO

Command object carrying all inputs required to create a new reservation via ReservaService.GenerarReserva.

IngresoDTO

Projection of a facility check-in (Ingreso) record with a hydrated client name.

MembresiaDTO

Projection of a Membresia entity exposed through BLL service boundaries.

PagoDTO

Projection of a Pago entity used as both input and output for payment operations.

ReservaDTO

Projection of a Reserva entity with denormalized client and space names.

ResultadoIngresoDTO

Result returned by ClienteService.ValidarIngreso describing whether a client is permitted to enter the facility and the reason when access is denied.

RutinaDTO

Projection of a Rutina (training routine) entity with its associated exercises.

Enums

ClienteStatus

Indicates whether a client account is active or has been deactivated.

EstadoBalance

Categorized account balance state derived from the numeric balance value.

Made with docfx
